ddls:
CREATE TABLE "soil_samples" (
  "sample_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the soil sample */,
  "barcode_sequence" TEXT /* Barcode sequence associated with the sample */,
  "linker_primer_sequence" TEXT /* Linker primer sequence used in analysis */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of sample (e.g., soil) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the sample was collected */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the sample was collected */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day the sample was collected */,
  "sample_time" TEXT /* Time the sample was collected */,
  "sample_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the sample collection site */,
  "sample_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the sample collection site */,
  "sample_elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the sample collection site */,
  "sample_site_description" TEXT /* Description of the site where the sample was taken */,
  "sample_depth" REAL /* Depth at which the sample was collected (in cm) */,
  "sample_footfall" TEXT /* Footfall description at the sampling site */,
  "sample_vegetation" TEXT /* Vegetation present at the sampling site */,
  "sample_weather_temp" REAL /* Weather temperature during sampling */,
  "sample_moisture" TEXT /* Moisture state of the sample (e.g., dry, moist) */,
  "sample_soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil */,
  "sample_organic_matter" REAL /* Organic matter content in the soil */,
  "sample_conductivity" REAL /* Electrical conductivity of the soil */,
  "sample_color" TEXT /* Color of the soil */,
  "sample_texture" TEXT /* Texture of the soil (e.g., fine, coarse) */,
  "sample_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the sample (e.g., coring, augering) */,
  "sample_description" TEXT /* General description of the sample's condition */,
  "sample_ph" REAL /* pH level of the soil sample */,
  "sample_potassium" TEXT /* Potassium content (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "sample_nitrogen" TEXT /* Nitrogen content (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "sample_phosphorus" TEXT /* Phosphorus content (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional description or notes about the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier for the location */,
  "location_elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "sample_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the sampling site */,
  "sample_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the sampling site */,
  "site_description" TEXT /* Description of the sampling site */,
  "location_vegetation" TEXT /* Vegetation present at the location */,
  "location_soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil at the location */,
  "location_water_source" TEXT /* Proximity to water sources (e.g., river, lake) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the weather record */,
  "sample_id" TEXT /* Reference to the sample associated with the weather conditions */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature during the sample collection */,
  "moisture" TEXT /* Moisture condition (e.g., dry, moist) */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity during the sample collection */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation during the sample collection */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed during the sample collection */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction during the sample collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_conditions_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES soil_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nutrient_levels" (
  "nutrient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the nutrient record */,
  "sample_id" TEXT /* Reference to the sample associated with the nutrient levels */,
  "ph" REAL /* pH level of the soil sample */,
  "potassium" TEXT /* Potassium content level */,
  "nitrogen" TEXT /* Nitrogen content level */,
  "phosphorus" TEXT /* Phosphorus content level */,
  "organic_carbon" REAL /* Organic carbon content in the soil */,
  "sulfur" REAL /* Sulfur content in the soil */,
  "iron" REAL /* Iron content in the soil */,
  "manganese" REAL /* Manganese content in the soil */,
  "zinc" REAL /* Zinc content in the soil */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nutrient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nutrient_levels_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES soil_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_team" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the team record */,
  "sample_id" TEXT /* Reference to the sample collected by the team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team collecting the sample */,
  "team_leader" TEXT /* Name of the team leader */,
  "team_members" TEXT /* List of team members involved in the collection */,
  "team_institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization the team belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_team_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES soil_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_descriptions" (
  "description_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the description record */,
  "sample_id" TEXT /* Reference to the sample associated with the description */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the sample condition */,
  "sample_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the sample */,
  "sample_images" TEXT /* Links to images of the sample or sampling site */,
  "sample_videos" TEXT /* Links to videos of the sample or sampling process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("description_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_descriptions_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES soil_samples ("sample_id")
)
